name: Sellsuki Design System

brand.product: Sellsuki — E-commerce management platform for Thai merchants
brand.mood: Professional, clean, trustworthy, light, airy, functional
brand.design: Clarity over decoration — flat design, minimal shadows

typography.note: Use DB HeaventRounded for ALL text — headings, body, labels, buttons, badges, nav. NEVER use Inter.

appshell.usage: Always use AppShell for full-page layouts. Never compose raw TopNavbar + Sidebar + div manually.

rules: Flat clean design — no heavy shadows or gradients
Handle loading, empty, and error states
DB HeaventRounded for ALL text — headings, body, labels, buttons, badges — NEVER use Inter
Only colors from the defined palette
Use AppShell for all full-page layouts — not raw TopNavbar + Sidebar
Use FeaturePageScaffold layout prop — not custom layout wrappers

tailwind_patterns.button-primary: h-9 px-4 bg-[#32a9ff] hover:bg-[#1b8bf5] text-white text-[18px] font-semibold rounded-lg font-['DB_HeaventRounded']
tailwind_patterns.button-secondary: h-9 px-4 bg-[#f3f4f6] hover:bg-[#e5e7eb] text-[#1f2937] text-[18px] font-semibold rounded-lg font-['DB_HeaventRounded']
tailwind_patterns.button-outline: h-9 px-4 border border-[#32a9ff] text-[#32a9ff] bg-white hover:bg-[#f0f9ff] text-[18px] font-semibold rounded-lg font-['DB_HeaventRounded']
tailwind_patterns.button-destructive: h-9 px-4 bg-[#e11d48] hover:bg-[#be123c] text-white text-[18px] font-semibold rounded-lg font-['DB_HeaventRounded']
tailwind_patterns.input: w-full h-9 px-3 border border-[#e5e7eb] rounded-lg text-[18px] text-[#1f2937] placeholder:text-[#9ca3af] focus:border-[#32a9ff] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#32a9ff] outline-none font-['DB_HeaventRounded']
tailwind_patterns.badge-success: px-2 py-0.5 text-[18px] font-semibold rounded-full bg-[#d1fae5] text-[#065f46] font-['DB_HeaventRounded']
tailwind_patterns.badge-warning: px-2 py-0.5 text-[18px] font-semibold rounded-full bg-[#fef3c7] text-[#92400e] font-['DB_HeaventRounded']
tailwind_patterns.badge-danger: px-2 py-0.5 text-[18px] font-semibold rounded-full bg-[#ffe4e6] text-[#9f1239] font-['DB_HeaventRounded']
tailwind_patterns.table-header: px-4 py-3 bg-[#f9fafb] text-[#6b7280] text-[16px] font-semibold uppercase text-left font-['DB_HeaventRounded']
tailwind_patterns.sidebar-item: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-[18px] text-[#6b7280] hover:bg-[#f0f9ff] hover:text-[#32a9ff] font-['DB_HeaventRounded']
tailwind_patterns.sidebar-item-active: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-[18px] bg-[#f0f9ff] text-[#32a9ff] font-medium font-['DB_HeaventRounded']
